# mcphub

> One hub for all your MCP servers. Define them once in mcphub.yaml, run a single
> stdio gateway that proxies them all as namespaced `server__tool` tools, and sync
> the right config into 12 agent harnesses (Claude Code, opencode, Codex, Copilot
> CLI, Qwen Code, Gemini CLI, Kilo Code, Kimi Code CLI, Crush, Forge, Hermes,
> local-agent). Every proxied call is recorded to a local SQLite ledger. Go, MIT,
> no cgo. Install: `brew install abdul-hamid-achik/tap/mcphub`.

## Guide

- [Getting started](https://mcphubcli.dev/guide/getting-started): install, init, first sync, point an agent at the gateway
- [Concepts](https://mcphubcli.dev/guide/concepts): the registry, the gateway, gateway vs direct mode, expose all vs lazy
- [Sync to your agents](https://mcphubcli.dev/guide/sync): dry-run default, .bak backups, surgical merge, ownership pruning, resume/rollback
- [Lazy mode & pinning](https://mcphubcli.dev/guide/lazy-mode): context-aware discovery with use_when hints, seven meta-tools, pin --top N
- [Contextual routing for harnesses](https://mcphubcli.dev/guide/contextual-routing): task/phase triggers, resolver contract, host-assisted advisors, deduplication, safety, and acceptance tests
- [Oversized results](https://mcphubcli.dev/guide/results): lossless spooling, callId receipts, paged recovery
- [Intelligence](https://mcphubcli.dev/guide/intelligence): stats, status, sync drift, token cost per server
- [Secrets via tvault](https://mcphubcli.dev/guide/secrets): vault: spawn injection, tvault:// header refs
- [Per-agent routing](https://mcphubcli.dev/guide/routing): servers/tools allowlists per agent
- [Studio TUI](https://mcphubcli.dev/guide/studio): interactive server/agent/stats terminal UI
- [Agent harnesses](https://mcphubcli.dev/guide/harnesses): all 12 supported harnesses, paths, formats, quirks
- [Connect Bob](https://mcphubcli.dev/guide/bob): the Bob repository-factory integration
- [Fetch HTTP responses with Hitspec](https://mcphubcli.dev/guide/hitspec): route bounded HTTP and saved-request tasks to Hitspec, with an explicit reviewed handoff for file.cheap persistence
- [Troubleshooting](https://mcphubcli.dev/guide/troubleshooting): doctor, probe, common failures, FAQ

## Reference

- [CLI](https://mcphubcli.dev/reference/cli): every command and flag
- [Configuration](https://mcphubcli.dev/reference/config): the full mcphub.yaml schema, including use_when routing hints
- [Gateway meta-tools](https://mcphubcli.dev/reference/meta-tools): the seven mcphub_* tools agents call

## Source

- [GitHub](https://github.com/abdul-hamid-achik/mcphub): Go source, issues, releases
